description: As Northwind Traders expands sales to Europe, configure Manager.io for multi-currency operations. Set the base currency to USD and add EUR as a foreign currency with an exchange rate of 1.08. Update the customer 'Alfreds Futterkiste' to use EUR and issue a sales invoice (Reference: INV-EUR-001) dated 2025-01-15 for an 'Organic Honey Shipment' totaling 2500.00 EUR.
